title: geum roylei
intro: Geum roylei, also known as the Himalayan avens, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Geum roylei include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Geum roylei is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
